title: galium rubrum var. hirtum
intro: Galium rubrum var. hirtum, also known as red bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of red bedstraw include its potential to relieve menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of red bedstraw include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
